findings.blocker: Function.Bijective ⇑forwardAlg is the residual single sorry, packaging Steps 2 + 3 of the M1.b 4-step chain together. The bijectivity decomposes via IsLocalization.lift_injective_iff and IsLocalization.lift_surjective_iff into two Mathlib gap pieces: (i) explicit filtered-colim element representation for the lan-defined colim S.presheaf | CostructuredArrow (Opens.map f.base).op (op V) — no off-the-shelf bridge; one must transport IsPointwiseLeftKanExtensionAt → IsColimit (coconeAt _) → isoColimit → CommRingCat.FilteredColimits.colimitCocone; ~80-150 LOC of categorical bookkeeping; and (ii) basic-open cofinality in Opens S — for every W ⊇ fV open in U, exhibit g ∈ M with D(g) ⊆ W; pointwise via IsAffineOpen.exists_basicOpen_le + quasi-compactness of fV + a prime-avoidance combine; ~50-80 LOC. Neither piece is on the Mathlib closing slate for snapshot b80f227.

attempts.goal_before:
X S : Scheme
f : X ⟶ S
U : S.Opens
V : X.Opens
hU : IsAffineOpen U
hV : IsAffineOpen V
e : V ≤ f ⁻¹ᵁ U
this : Algebra ↑Γ(S, U) ↑(((TopCat.Presheaf.pullback CommRingCat f.base).obj S.presheaf).obj (Opposite.op V)) :=
  appLE_colimAlgebra f e
M : Submonoid ↑Γ(S, U) := appLE_unitSubmonoid f hU hV e
hM_def : M = appLE_unitSubmonoid f hU hV e
h_unit_ring : ∀ (y : ↥M), IsUnit ((CommRingCat.Hom.hom (appLE_colimRingHom f e)) ↑y)
forward : Localization M →+* ↑(((TopCat.Presheaf.pullback CommRingCat f.base).obj S.presheaf).obj (Opposite.op V)) :=
  IsLocalization.lift h_unit_ring
h_fwd_comp : forward.comp (algebraMap (↑Γ(S, U)) (Localization M)) = CommRingCat.Hom.hom (appLE_colimRingHom f e)
⊢ Localization M ≃ₐ[↑Γ(S, U)] ↑(((TopCat.Presheaf.pullback CommRingCat f.base).obj S.presheaf).obj (Opposite.op V))
attempts.goal_after: (after the AlgHom promotion + AlgEquiv.ofBijective reduction) — single remaining goal at the sorry inside `AlgEquiv.ofBijective forwardAlg ?_`:\n  ⊢ Function.Bijective ⇑forwardAlg\n  (with forwardAlg : Localization M →ₐ[↑Γ(S, U)] A_colim and the algebra-map compatibility commutes' closed in-body)
attempts.insight: The AlgEquiv.ofBijective reduction is structurally cleaner than the previously planned RingEquiv.ofRingHom + AlgEquiv.ofRingEquiv chain (iter-123 attempt-2 comment recipe). Two wins: (i) the commutes' algebra-map compatibility closes via a single `exact RingHom.congr_fun h_fwd_comp r` call (1 LOC of proof), eliminating one third of the iter-123 residual's content; (ii) the remaining work is the named, concrete `Function.Bijective ⇑forwardAlg` claim, decomposable via IsLocalization.lift_{injective,surjective}_iff into two precise Mathlib-gap pieces (filtered-colim element representation + basic-open cofinality). Net per-file sorry change: 1 → 1 (the sorry moved L362 → L398; the structural narrowing is the iter-124 deliverable, not a sorry-count reduction). Both Mathlib gap pieces were verified by lemma searches this iter: IsLocalization.lift_injective_iff, IsLocalization.lift_surjective_iff, CommRingCat.FilteredColimits.colimitCoconeIsColimit, Functor.LeftExtension.IsPointwiseLeftKanExtensionAt + isoColimit, IsAffineOpen.exists_basicOpen_le, IsAffineOpen.isLocalization_basicOpen, AlgEquiv.ofBijective. The negative search results are documented: no `IsLocalization.bijective_lift_iff`; no off-the-shelf `colim_of_localizations` lemma; the `IsLocalization.atUnits` family is for the wrong setup.
